results.title: Dame Jools Topp dies aged 68: Dame Lynda shares twin’s final message to fans
results.description: Dame Lynda Topp has shared her twin sister Jools Topp’s final message of thanks to Kiwis.

results.title: Comedy icon dies after she and co-star twin receive same cancer diagnosis
results.description: In a tragic twist of fate, both sisters - who performed together - battled the same disease.

results.title: Comedy icon dies after she and co-star twin receive same cancer diagnosis - Daily Express
